summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ATC Master Platform iteration 3 - AI Email Generation, SCHADS Payroll Management, and Compliance Tracking. All 34 backend tests passed (18 existing + 16 new). All frontend UI flows working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data used: 1 staff (Daniel Hayward with 7 compliance documents), 1 client (Shaun Case), 5 CRM leads, 1 completed shift
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features tested and working: AI Email Generation (using Emergent LLM with GPT-4o), SCHADS Payroll Management (rates, summary, calculate, process), Compliance Tracking (dashboard, staff compliance, add/delete documents). Daniel Hayward has 7 compliance documents but is missing 4 critical ones (NDIS Worker Screening Check, National Police Check, CPR Certificate, NDIS Worker Orientation Module) resulting in 33% compliance score.

ai_email_generation.personalization: Generates role-specific content for Support Coordinator, Plan Manager, Recovery Coach
ai_email_generation.ui_modal: AI-Powered Outreach modal with Regenerate and Deploy buttons

payroll_management.schads_rates: GET /api/payroll/rates - Returns Level 2, 3, 4 rates with weekday/saturday/sunday/public_holiday
payroll_management.payroll_summary: GET /api/payroll/summary - Calculates totals for all staff in period
payroll_management.payroll_calculate: GET /api/payroll/calculate - Calculates for specific staff member
payroll_management.ui_components: Pay Period selector, Calculate Payroll button, Payroll Summary table, Process Payroll button

compliance_tracking.expiring: GET /api/compliance/expiring - Returns documents expiring within days
compliance_tracking.ui_components: Compliance score card, Valid/Expired/Expiring/Missing counts, Staff list, Document list, Add Document modal
